description: Fix entire site translation issues, optimize pages for SEO with long-tail keywords, fix style misalignment and mobile compatibility, verify with Webapp Testing

userStories.title: Batch fix: Pass translated title/description from page.tsx to all 50 Client components
userStories.description: As a site owner, I need every tool detail page to display translated H1 titles and descriptions in the correct language. Currently, all 50 Client components pass hardcoded English metadata to ToolLayout. Fix: modify each page.tsx to extract nameTranslations/descriptionTranslations from tools data and pass as titleOverride/descriptionOverride props; modify each Client component to accept these props and pass to ToolLayout instead of hardcoded metadata.title/description.
acceptanceCriteria: All 50 page.tsx files: add titleOverride/descriptionOverride props derived from (tool.nameTranslations?.[locale] || tool.name) and (tool.descriptionTranslations?.[locale] || tool.description)

All 50 Client.tsx files: accept titleOverride/descriptionOverride optional props and pass to <ToolLayout title={titleOverride || metadata.title} description={descriptionOverride || metadata.description}>
ToolLayout renders the passed title/description in H1, breadcrumbs, and description (already does this)
Visually verify on /es/tools/bmi-calculator: H1 shows translated title, description shows translated text
Visually verify on /ar/tools/bmi-calculator: H1 shows Arabic title, description shows Arabic text, RTL layout correct
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is a batch operation across 50 files. Use a script approach: read each file, apply regex/string replacement, write back. The pattern is consistent across all tools. Tools data already has complete translations in tools.ts.

userStories.title: Add Try It Now button translation in ToolLayout
userStories.description: As a non-English user, I need the 'Try it now' button text in ToolLayout to be translated. Currently hardcoded English.
acceptanceCriteria: ToolLayout 'Try it now' button text uses dict: getTranslation(dict, 'toolPage.tryItNow') with fallback
Verify /es/tools/bmi-calculator shows Spanish button text
Verify /ar/tools/bmi-calculator shows Arabic button text
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Check if ToolLayout has a 'Try it now' button or if it's in individual components. If in ToolLayout, add to t object.

userStories.title: Fix ToolLayout hardcoded FAQ content for tools without faqTranslations
userStories.description: As a non-English user, when a tool doesn't have faqTranslations, the fallback FAQ content should still be localized. Currently shows hardcoded English.
acceptanceCriteria: ToolLayout fallback how-to-use content (when tool.howToUse is missing) uses dict translations with proper fallback
ToolLayout FAQ default content uses dict for section labels
Verify tools without FAQ translations still show translated section headers
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The fallback content at lines 203-207 of ToolLayout is hardcoded English. Move these defaults to common.json under toolPage namespace.

userStories.title: Add Open Graph and Twitter Card translations for tool pages
userStories.description: As a site owner, I need social sharing previews to show translated titles and descriptions per locale. Currently OG/Twitter meta uses translated data from generateMetadata but the page.tsx files may not all have this correctly wired up.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify all 50 page.tsx generateMetadata functions use seoTitleTranslations[locale] and seoDescriptionTranslations[locale]
Open Graph locale attribute set correctly (en_US, es_ES, ar_SA)
Canonical and alternate URLs include locale prefix
Spot check 3 tools in each locale: og:title and og:description match locale language
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Most page.tsx files were generated with the correct pattern already. Verify consistency. Tools data already has seoTitleTranslations and seoDescriptionTranslations.

userStories.title: Fix mobile responsive layout issues across site
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I need the site to display correctly on small screens. Issues to check: header nav overlap, tool page content overflow, form inputs too narrow, button text overflow.
acceptanceCriteria: Header: nav items stack properly on screens <640px, language switcher doesn't overlap
ToolLayout: H1 title wraps correctly, doesn't overflow on narrow screens
All calculator forms: input fields and buttons don't overflow on <400px width
ToolCard grid on homepage: switches to single column on mobile (already uses sm:grid-cols-2 or similar)
Verify with Chrome DevTools mobile emulation at 375px and 414px widths
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using Webapp Testing skill
userStories.notes: Use Webapp Testing skill screenshots to verify. Check: Header, BMI page, Age Calculator, Life Hacks, homepage at 375px width.

userStories.title: Add structured data (JSON-LD) translations for SEO
userStories.description: As a site owner, I need JSON-LD structured data to include translated names and descriptions for each locale, so search engines index translated content correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: ToolLayout WebApplication schema uses translated name and description from props
FAQ schema in ToolLayout uses translated FAQ questions and answers
Homepage includes WebSite schema with translated name
Verify with Google Rich Results Test tool format (valid JSON-LD structure)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: ToolLayout already includes JSON-LD for WebApplication and FAQPage. Ensure name/description in the schema use the translated values, not hardcoded English.

userStories.title: Complete Webapp Testing verification across all locales
userStories.description: As a QA tester, I need automated browser verification that all 3 locales (en, es, ar) render correctly on key pages: homepage, BMI Calculator, Age Calculator, Life Hacks.
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshot of /en/tools/bmi-calculator: verify English text correct
Screenshot of /es/tools/bmi-calculator: verify Spanish text visible (not English)
Screenshot of /ar/tools/bmi-calculator: verify Arabic text visible, RTL layout correct
Screenshot of /es/: homepage categories and tool cards in Spanish
Screenshot of /ar/: homepage in Arabic, RTL direction
Console log check: no JavaScript errors on any page
Verify in browser using Webapp Testing skill
userStories.notes: Use Webapp Testing skill. Launch browser, navigate to each URL, take screenshots, check console logs. Report any remaining untranslated text.

userStories.title: Push to GitHub and trigger Vercel deployment
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the changes deployed to production so the fixes are live.
acceptanceCriteria: All changes committed with descriptive message
Push to GitHub using proxy (http://127.0.0.1:17890)
Verify push succeeded
Trigger Vercel deployment or verify auto-deploy started
userStories.notes: Use git -c http.proxy=http://127.0.0.1:17890 -c https.proxy=http://127.0.0.1:17890 push. PAT available in memory.
